sentence: Hoje não faz sol nem calor.
ipa: ˈɔʒɨ ˈnɐ̃w̃ ˈfaz ˈsɔɫ ˈnẽj̃ kaˈloɾ
gloss_en: Today it is neither sunny nor hot.
notes: Unstressed /a/ stays open [a] in 'calor' with no EP [ɐ] centralisation per undolo2014; velarised coda [ɫ] in 'sol' and open [ɔ] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O bilhete do machimbombo custa cem kwanzas.
ipa: ʊ biˈʎɛtɨ dʊ maʃĩˈbõbʊ ˈkusta ˈsẽj̃ ˈkwɐ̃zas
gloss_en: The bus ticket costs a hundred kwanzas.
notes: Angolan lexicon 'machimbombo' (bus) and 'kwanza' (currency) per chavagne2005; pretonic /o/ unreduced in 'machimbombo'->[maʃĩˈbõbʊ] per undolo2014; palatal [ʎ] in 'bilhete' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Tenho consulta na quinta-feira às nove horas.
ipa: ˈtɛɲʊ kõˈsuɫta na ˈkĩta ˈfejɾa as ˈnɔvɨ ˈɔɾas
gloss_en: I have an appointment on Thursday at nine.
notes: Final unstressed [ɨ] in 'nove'->[ˈnɔvɨ], the sole surviving reduction vowel in Angolan Portuguese per undolo2014; palatal [ɲ] in 'tenho' and dark coda [ɫ] in 'consulta' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: A minha família mora num musseque de Luanda.
ipa: a ˈmiɲa faˈmilia ˈmɔɾa ˈnũ muˈs̺ɛkɨ dɨ luˈɐ̃da
gloss_en: My family lives in a Luanda shantytown.
notes: Angolan lexicon 'musseque' (shantytown) per chavagne2005; pretonic /o/ kept in 'mora'->[ˈmɔɾa] and final /a/ open in 'Luanda' with no reduction per undolo2014; palatal [ɲ] in 'minha' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Vira à direita e segue sempre em frente.
ipa: ˈviɾa a diˈɾejta i ˈsɛɡɨ ˈsẽpʁ ẽj̃ ˈfʁẽtɨ
gloss_en: Turn right and keep going straight ahead.
notes: Retained /ej/ diphthong in 'direita' per undolo2014; strong [ʁ] in the 'fr' cluster of 'frente' per chavagne2005; imperative register per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: O calulu está muito bom com bastante peixe.
ipa: ʊ kaluˈlu eˈsta ˈmujtʊ ˈbõ kõ baˈstɐ̃tɨ ˈpejʃɨ
gloss_en: This calulu is very good with a lot of fish.
notes: Angolan dish 'calulu' per chavagne2005; nasal /o/ in 'bom'/'com' and retained /ej/ in 'peixe' with the non-reducing vocalism per undolo2014.

sentence: Onde apanho o candongueiro para o centro?
ipa: ˈõd aˈpaɲʊ ʊ kɐ̃dõˈɡejɾʊ ˈpaɾa ʊ ˈsẽtʁʊ
gloss_en: Where do I catch the shared taxi to the centre?
notes: Angolan lexicon 'candongueiro' (minibus taxi) per chavagne2005; palatal [ɲ] in 'apanho' and hard [ɡ] before the front glide in 'candongueiro' per mateus_dandrade2000; interrogative register per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: Quantos kwanzas custa o peixe fresco?
ipa: ˈkwɐ̃tos ˈkwɐ̃zas ˈkusta ʊ ˈpejʃɨ ˈfʁeskʊ
gloss_en: How many kwanzas does the fresh fish cost?
notes: Nasal [ɐ̃] in 'quantos'/'kwanzas' and open [ɛ] with strong [ʁ] in 'fresco' per chavagne2005; quantifier interrogative per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: Se chovesse, ficávamos em casa.
ipa: sɨ ʃoˈvɛs̺ɨ fiˈkavamos ẽj̃ ˈkaza
gloss_en: If it rained, we would stay home.
notes: [ʃ] onset and open [ɛ] in 'chovesse' per mateus_dandrade2000; final /a/ open in 'casa'->[ˈkaza] with no EP [ɐ] per undolo2014; conditional-imperfect frame per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: Ontem comprei peixe no mercado do Roque.
ipa: ˈõtẽj̃ kõˈpʁej ˈpejʃɨ nʊ meˈʁkadʊ dʊ ˈɾɔkɨ
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought fish at the Roque market.
notes: Reference to Luanda's Roque market per inverno2011; retained /ej/ in 'comprei'/'peixe' per undolo2014; strong coda [ʁ] in 'mercado' per chavagne2005.

sentence: Para o ano vou viajar até ao Huambo.
ipa: ˈpaɾa ʊ ˈanʊ ˈvo viaˈʒaɾ aˈtɛ aʊ uˈɐ̃bʊ
gloss_en: Next year I will travel to Huambo.
notes: Angolan place name Huambo per inverno2011; /aw/ diphthong in 'ao' liaison and /o/ monophthong in 'vou'->[ˈvo] per undolo2014; open [ɛ] in 'até' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Liga-me mais tarde, por favor.
ipa: ˈliɡa mɨ ˈmajs ˈtaʁdɨ poɾ faˈvɔɾ
gloss_en: Call me later, please.
notes: Open [ɔ] in 'por'/'favor' and strong coda [ʁ] in 'tarde' per chavagne2005; clitic imperative 'liga-me' per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: Olá kota, tudo bem contigo?
ipa: oˈla ˈkɔta ˈtudʊ ˈbẽj̃ kõˈtiɡʊ
gloss_en: Hello elder, are you doing well?
notes: Angolan address 'kota' (respected elder) per chavagne2005; full unreduced vowels [ˈtudʊ], [kõˈtiɡʊ] with no EP centralisation per undolo2014; greeting register per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: Quem não arrisca, não petisca.
ipa: ˈkẽj̃ ˈnɐ̃w̃ aˈʁiska ˈnɐ̃w̃ peˈtiska
gloss_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
notes: Strong [ʁ] from 'rr' in 'arrisca' per chavagne2005; nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'não' per mateus_dandrade2000; proverb attested in cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: O carro do mais-velho ficou na rua molhada.
ipa: ʊ ˈkaʁʊ dʊ ˈmajs ˈvɛʎʊ fiˈko na ˈɾua moˈʎada
gloss_en: The elder's car ended up on the wet street.
notes: Angolan 'mais-velho' as a respect term for an elder per inverno2011; strong [ʁ] from 'rr' in 'carro' and palatal [ʎ] in 'velho'/'molhada' per chavagne2005.

sentence: A garina trouxe um ramo de flores roxas.
ipa: a ɡaˈɾina ˈtʁosɨ ˈũ ˈɾamʊ dɨ ˈflɔɾes ˈɾɔʃas
gloss_en: The girl brought a bunch of red flowers.
notes: Angolan slang 'garina' (young woman) per chavagne2005; strong word-initial [ʁ] in 'ramo'/'roxas' and 'ou' diphthong in 'trouxe' per undolo2014.

sentence: O meu camba bebeu bué de cerveja na farra.
ipa: ʊ ˈmew ˈkɐ̃ba beˈbew buˈɛ dɨ seˈʁvɛʒa na ˈfaʁa
gloss_en: My mate drank a lot of beer at the party.
notes: Angolan slang 'camba' (friend), 'bué' (a lot) and 'farra' (party) per chavagne2005; strong [ʁ] in 'cerveja'/'farra' and open [ɛ] per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Aquele rapaz vende jornais na esquina.
ipa: aˈkɛlɨ ɾaˈpaz ˈvẽdɨ ʒoˈʁnajs na eˈskina
gloss_en: That young man sells newspapers on the corner.
notes: Strong word-initial [ʁ] in 'rapaz', open [ɛ] in 'aquele' and full unreduced pretonic vowels per undolo2014; register per cunha_cintra1984.

sentence: O melhor vinho branco vem de outra terra.
ipa: ʊ meˈʎɔɾ ˈviɲʊ ˈbʁɐ̃kʊ ˈvẽj̃ dɨ ˈotʁa ˈtɛʁa
gloss_en: The best white wine comes from elsewhere.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'melhor' and [ɲ] in 'vinho' per mateus_dandrade2000; 'ou' diphthong in 'outra' and strong coda [ʁ] per chavagne2005.

sentence: Nunca vi um céu tão azul sobre a baía.
ipa: ˈnũka ˈvi ˈũ ˈsɛw ˈtɐ̃w̃ aˈzuɫ ˈsobʁ a ˈbaia
gloss_en: I never saw such a blue sky over the bay.
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'tão', open [ɛ] in 'céu' and dark coda [ɫ] in 'azul' per mateus_dandrade2000; strong [ʁ] in 'sobre' per chavagne2005.
